abilities.description: When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.ae5994ceb3cba098]{Strike} or @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.723192c97fec4fe2]{Clash} in close quarters, add +1. On a strong hit with a match, you are unstoppable; mark progress.

When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.3f5a834fa3fea5d1]{Gain Ground} by moving into close quarters against your foe, choose one.

  • Charge: Roll +heart, and mark progress on a hit.
  • Evade: Roll +edge, and take +1 momentum on a hit.

You wield an iconic blade. Give it a name. When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.9c9ab6a42daa96e0]{Swear an Iron Vow} by binding your promise to the blade, add +1. On a hit, fill the circle below. If you make a move (including a progress move) using this oathbound blade and score a miss, you may clear the circle to reroll any dice.
